title: oxytropis aven-nelsonii
intro: Oxytropis aven-nelsonii, also known as Aven Nelson's globemallow, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family. It is a shrubby, greenish-yellow flowered plant native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Oxytropis aven-nelsonii include soothing digestive issues and alleviating respiratory problems, and it can be prepared as a tea or infusion for consumption.
